parameters.query:
SELECT
  o.id         AS org_id,
  o.user_id,
  o.name       AS org_name,
  p.email,
  p.plan,
  -- Previous week's score (for delta calculation)
  (
    SELECT total_score
    FROM trust_score_history
    WHERE org_id = o.id
      AND created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '6 days'
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) AS prev_score
FROM organisations o
JOIN profiles p ON p.id = o.user_id
WHERE p.plan != 'cancelled'
  AND p.email IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY o.id;

SELECT
  total_score,
  governance_score,
  financial_score,
  document_score,
  track_record_score,
  application_score,
  improvements
FROM trust_score_history
WHERE org_id = $1
ORDER BY created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
